fields.label: Choose cursor style for all players.
Check this box and click the green button to reset the game.

aid1.detail:
Game Structure
On your turn either pass or begin a construction project.

Pass: Click the pass button to draw a card and end your turn.

Begin Construction:
1. Either click on one construction token or drag the column token from your area and drop it under a construction token.
2. All other players simultaneously click on their resources to move them to their bidding boxes. When done, they click on their Bid button or their X icon.

objects.css: background-color:#deb887;border: 2px solid black; border-radius:8px; text-align: center

phase1.detail:
Eye Icon: If the eye is showing in the top right, that means at least one other player is looking at this value change window. Click on the eye to forcibly close the window for all players except for yourself.

Update button: Closes this window and updates your values according to the inputted change. This change will not show up in the history box until all players have closed the modify value window.

Change by: You may type a positive or negative value here, and this difference will automatically apply to the 'Set to' value next to it.

Set Total to: You may type any value here to indicate the total value, and this will automatically calculate the difference and show this as the 'Change by' value next to it.

+/- buttons: Click these buttons to add or subtract 1/5 value from the 'Set Total to' & 'Change by' values.

info.name: Building Buildings
info.attribution:
Layout, board, cards, design, coding, and library image by Jonathan Cox (email: Contact@GettingGames.com for inquiries) and released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The buildings are modified from emojis whose attribution is in the About overlay. The pedestal holder is a modified version https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/ionic-column.html available under CC BY 3.0 by Delapouite.

All other icons are from assets with attribution in the About overlay.

The sound while changing turns is "Wrong Answer" by UNIVERSFIELD and is available under the Pixabay License at https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/wrong-answer-129254/.
info.description: Everyone wants to help you build buildings and declining their offers can be costly!
info.similarAwards:
2009 Nederlandse Spellenprijs Nominee
2005 Japan Boardgame Prize Best Advanced Game Nominee
info.helpText:
Game structure information can be found by hovering your mouse over the information box in the bottom right of the screen.

Players take seats. Press the Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start. 

Select a building token by right clicking on it or dragging the pedestal under it. Then, all other players simultaneously choose cards to bid by left-clicking on them or dragging them into their bidding area on their right. Once ready, they lock their by by clicking their bid button. They can unlock and change the bid by right clicking or dragging any cards to or from their bidding area.

Once all bids are locked, the active player clicks either "Return & Score" or "Pay & Cube" buttons for each opponent. "Return & Score" returns that opponents cards to their hand and automatically scores them points equal to that about. "Pay & Cube" discards the bid cards and places that number of that player's cubes onto the currently selected building. The active player will also automatically gain the building token. If there is a trade card in the bid (shown by it saying "Trade Bid"), then that player will gain the building token and the active player will have their cubes placed for each discarded card. The active player can also pay their own resources by left-clicking or dragging their resources into their payment area to their right. Once the correct amount of resources are moved to the payment area, click on the "Pay # resources & place cubes" button to discard those resources and place that number of the active player's cubes onto the current building.

Modify a player's score by clicking on their score value and then following the prompt box instructions.

Once a building is scored, left-click and drag the black disc in the Completed Building VP area one space to the right.

Clicking on the "Hide All Bids" button will hide all revealed bids in case an error has happened and/or someone wants a redo. Clicking on the "Show All Bids" button will reveal all bids even if they are not locked.
